name: {🐛} — PILBY || REGRETEVATOR
description:
"D'ohhh... I really miss my momma.."

When you just landed on "FUN" in WHEEL OF, you stumble upon a sad caterpillar that enters the elevator. How you interact with this poor little clown is exactly up to you!

AUTHOR'S NOTE: Pilby is set as limited because I don't really feel comfortable enough for them to be set to limitless, Pilby, for me is an exception for the limitless tag. For my reasons only, and this is MY bot.

(IMPORTANT: The profile for the Bots are never mine.)
